case_title: GRANT PRINTING VS T - SUN TRADING

docket_entries.description: ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT T - SUN TRADING HEARING SET FOR APR-12-1993 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 06
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT T - SUN TRADING
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RESET AS TO DEFENDANT T - SUN TRADING HEARING SET FOR MAY-24-1993 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 06
ORDER OF EXAMINATION CAN BE REISSUED DUE TO LOSS OF PAPERWORK.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRANT PRINTING RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT T - SUN TRADING $3,804.00 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,840.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER OF EXAMINATION WAS DISCHARGED ON 4/14/93 NOT 5/24/93.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,804.00 FILED BY GRANT PRINTING AS TO DEFENDANT T - SUN TRADING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-29-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF MAY-24-1993, DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT T - SUN TRADING
